overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character leading a horse along a railway track through a rainy, forested valley. The character walks steadily through grasslands and rocky terrain while light rain falls continuously, eventually moving to the other side of the horse mid-journey.

agents.ego_description: leading a horse by the reins along the railway track through open grassland

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly beside the character on the left side

entered.detail: metal railway tracks with wooden sleepers running through the grass
gravel stones lining the railway bed
tall green grass covering the valley floor beside the tracks
tree-covered hill rising on the left side of the valley
deciduous trees dotting the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy valley with railway tracks running through the center. The character leads a horse along the tracks while light rain falls. Forested hills rise on both sides, with scattered trees visible on the right slope.

events.description: large rock outcroppings appear on the right side of the railway track

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse as the terrain becomes rockier and more enclosed

notable_agents.action: horse maintaining steady pace beside the character

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face emerging on the right side of the tracks
tall vertical rock formation lining the railway cutting
thick forest visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The railway enters a more enclosed cutting with rock walls appearing on the right. The character continues leading the horse forward as the open valley gives way to rocky terrain. Dense forest becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky railway passage with overhanging vegetation

events.description: character moves from the right side of the horse to the left side, causing the camera to circle around the horse

agents.ego_description: moving around the horse to switch leading sides while continuing forward through the rocky passage

notable_agents.action: horse pausing briefly as the character moves around to the other side

entered.detail: dense bushes and small trees growing alongside the rock wall

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through a narrow rocky passage, moving around the horse to lead from the opposite side. The camera circles the horse during this maneuver. Rock walls line the right side while the railway continues toward denser forest ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested railway corridor with canopy cover

agents.ego_description: resuming steady walk along the tracks with the horse now on the right side

notable_agents.action: horse walking steadily on the character's right side

entered.detail: dense tree cover forming a tunnel-like canopy over the railway ahead

segments.scene_description: The railway enters a densely forested section with trees forming a canopy overhead. The character continues leading the horse, now positioned on the right side, as they walk deeper into the wooded corridor. The rocky terrain gives way to forest on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy valley that gradually transforms from an open grassland into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with the character leading a horse along railway tracks through a wide valley flanked by forested hills under a light rain. As the path progresses, the open landscape narrows into a rocky cutting with stone walls rising on the right, leading the way toward a distant treeline. The camera then circles the horse as the character shifts to the opposite side while navigating a narrow rocky passage, before the terrain opens up into a wooded corridor. Finally, the railway enters a thick forest where the trees form a canopy overhead, fully enveloping the character and horse in a dense woodland environment.
